description:
Creates single Notes Log.

#### See - [Daily Log guide](https://developers.procore.com/documentation/daily-logs) - for additional info on
* Attachments
* Locations

parameters.name: run_configurable_validations
parameters.description: If true, validations are run for the corresponding Configurable Field Set.

is_issue_day.description: The note being added is an issue affecting the projet

position.description: Order in which this entry was recorded

status.description: Is a log pending or approved

data_type.description: Data type of the Custom Field Definition

value.description: The value of the custom field

updated_at.description: Timestamp of last update to Location

deleted_at.description: Timestamp when the segment was soft deleted

deleted.description: Indicates if the segment is deleted

400.description: Can not create due to errors

403.description: User does not have right permissions

datetime.description: Datetime of record. Mutually exclusive with the date property.

is_issue_day.description: The note being added is an issue affecting the project

location_id.description: The ID of the Location of the Notes Log. `location_id` takes precedence over `mt_location`

mt_location.description: Use this for creating a new multi-tier or single-tier Location. This will be ignored if `location_id` is provided.

items.description: Look at Daily Log Guide for more info.

vendor_id.description: ID of the Vendor associated to the notes log

custom_field_%{custom_field_definition_i.description:
Value of the custom field. The data type of the value passed in corresponds with the data_type of the Custom Field Definition.
